description: Migrate all code references from gatherapp.vercel.app to gatherlists.com as the primary domain, keeping the old Vercel domain in CORS allow-lists and iOS entitlements as fallback.

userStories.title: Update Apple Sign-In redirectURI
userStories.description: As a user, I need Apple Sign-In to redirect to the new domain so authentication works on gatherlists.com.
acceptanceCriteria: src/context/AuthContext.jsx redirectURI changed from https://gatherapp.vercel.app to https://gatherlists.com
userStories.testIntensityReason: Auth redirect change — needs verification but single-line change

userStories.title: Update edge function CORS origins
userStories.description: As a user, I need the edge functions to accept requests from the new domain so image search works on gatherlists.com.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/functions/search-products/index.ts CORS allow-list includes both https://gatherlists.com and https://gatherapp.vercel.app
supabase/functions/search-images/index.ts CORS allow-list includes both https://gatherlists.com and https://gatherapp.vercel.app
userStories.notes: Added gatherlists.com as first CORS origin in both edge functions, kept gatherapp.vercel.app as fallback
userStories.testIntensityReason: CORS misconfiguration would break image search on new domain

userStories.title: Update iOS associated domains
userStories.description: As a user, I need Universal Links to work with the new domain so deep links from gatherlists.com open the app.
userStories.notes: Added applinks:gatherlists.com, kept applinks:gatherapp.vercel.app as fallback

userStories.title: Verify AASA file for new domain
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Apple App Site Association file to be served on the new domain so Universal Links verify correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: public/.well-known/apple-app-site-association is present (already exists — no change needed if Vercel serves it on the new domain automatically)
Verify AASA content uses correct bundle ID 53L3M4444A.com.gatherlists
userStories.notes: Verified — AASA already uses 53L3M4444A.com.gatherlists, no changes needed. Vercel will serve it on gatherlists.com automatically.
userStories.testIntensityReason: Verification only — no code changes expected

userStories.title: Update privacy policy URLs
userStories.description: As a user, I need the privacy policy to reference the correct domain.
acceptanceCriteria: public/privacy.html contact URL changed from gatherapp.vercel.app to gatherlists.com
docs/app-store/privacy-policy.md URL changed from gatherapp.vercel.app to gatherlists.com
userStories.notes: Updated contact URLs in both privacy.html and privacy-policy.md
userStories.testIntensityReason: Text-only URL replacement in static files

userStories.title: Update App Store metadata URLs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need App Store metadata to reference the new domain for support and marketing URLs.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/app-store/metadata.md Support URL changed to https://gatherlists.com
docs/app-store/metadata.md Marketing URL changed to https://gatherlists.com
userStories.notes: Updated both Support URL and Marketing URL to https://gatherlists.com
userStories.testIntensityReason: Text-only URL replacement in metadata doc

userStories.title: Sync iOS project with Capacitor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to run cap sync so the entitlement changes propagate to the iOS project.
acceptanceCriteria: npx cap sync ios completes without errors
userStories.notes: npm run build succeeded, npx cap sync ios completed without errors
userStories.testIntensityReason: Build + cap sync validates all prior changes compile correctly
